name: Espresso Mafia
summary: Girona specialty coffee choice with strong cycling-culture fit near the Rambla.
whyItMatters: This is the most on-theme Girona coffee stop for a Tour de France trip because it sits at the overlap of specialty coffee and the city cycling scene.
pros: European Coffee Trip lists Espresso Mafia among Girona's best specialty cafes
Financial Times cyclist guide highlights Espresso Mafia alongside La Fabrica as second-to-none Girona coffee
Central Rambla location is useful before or after Old Town wandering
cons: Current official opening hours were not found in crawlable sources
Likely popular with cyclists and visitors, so seating may be tight

logistics.opening_hours: Unknown; verify on the business's current social/map listing before relying on it
logistics.distance_from_base: Central Girona; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Not tied to a race viewing point
logistics.transit: Walkable from Girona center; verify from lodging
logistics.road_closure_notes: No race-day closure research found for this non-viewing stop

timing.best_visit_window: Morning or early afternoon Girona wander
timing.race_day_risk: Low unless central Girona events affect access

sources.title: European Coffee Trip Girona guide
sources.note: Lists Espresso Mafia among Girona specialty coffee candidates.

sources.title: Financial Times: Cyclist David Millar's guide to Girona
sources.note: Supports cycling-trip relevance and strong reputation for Espresso Mafia and La Fabrica coffee.
